TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2097-PS
1937 REICHSGESETZBLATT, PART I, PAGE 1317
Decree of the Fuehrer and Reich Chancellor relating to Designation of the Chief of the Praesidialkanzlei of 1 December 1937
The State secretary and chief of the Praesidialkanzlei will carry in the future the official designation "State Minister and chief of the Praesidialkanzlei of the Fuehrer and Reich Chancellor." He will be equal in rank to a Reich Minister.
Berlin, 1 December 1937
The Fuehrer and Reich Chancellor
Adolf Hitler
The State Secretary and Chief of the Praesidialkanzlei
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
